title: Musical Gravity Field
description: Scatter plot of 30,470 scrobbled tracks plotted against tempo and a second musical axis (key, rhythm regularity, loudness, or dynamic complexity). Colored by mood, energy, or major/minor; sized by play count. Hover reveals the track, click a legend label to isolate a category. Defaults to dynamic complexity vs. BPM colored by mood.
license_notes: Vanilla HTML/JS, no runtime deps. Pre-computed scatter_data.json derived from the day-002 music-charts enrichment pipeline (Spotify + ListenBrainz + MusicBrainz + AcousticBrainz, all CC0 or personal data). BPM and feature values come from AcousticBrainz (CC0) via Essentia.
